safety_note: Candidate local anchors only. These hints contain no CoilSnake project contents, rebuilt ROM bytes, or ROM-derived payload bytes, and must not be promoted beyond candidate status until a controlled diff identifies the changed span.

candidate_local_ranges.label: BATTLE_ACTION_TABLE
candidate_local_ranges.basis: Local table split and class2 action-table note identify D5:7B68 as 12-byte battle action rows.

field_hints.basis: notes/class2-d57b68-battle-action-table-match.md maps the first four row bytes as direction, target, type, and cost.

runtime_consumer_hints.basis: Consumes D5:7B68 action rows for targetting metadata.

runtime_consumer_hints.consumer: C1 battle PSI menu PP guard / row formatter
runtime_consumer_hints.basis: Existing PSI-menu notes describe PP availability and menu display as reading the associated D5:7B68 action row.

candidate_local_ranges.label: PSI_ABILITY_TABLE
candidate_local_ranges.basis: Local table split and PSI ability note identify D5:8A50 as 15-byte PSI ability rows.

field_hints.candidate_local_field: PSI ability row byte +0x06 Ness learn level
field_hints.basis: notes/battle-psi-ability-table-d58a50.md maps bytes +6..+8 to Ness, Paula, and Poo learn levels.

runtime_consumer_hints.basis: Uses character-specific learn-level bytes while building PSI entry lists.
C4 helper aliases D5:8A50 as PsiLearnTableD58A50 and reads per-character learn data.

candidate_local_ranges.label: ENEMY_CONFIGURATION_TABLE
candidate_local_ranges.basis: Local D5 source split and data-contract notes identify D5:9589 as the enemy configuration table.

field_hints.candidate_local_field: enemy row action slot; exact byte offset pending diff-confirmed join
field_hints.basis: CoilSnake YAML exposes action-slot vocabulary; local table range is known, but the field offset must wait for a changed span.

runtime_consumer_hints.basis: Existing C2 data-contract notes treat D5:9589 rows as battle-facing enemy records.

candidate_local_ranges.label: NPC_CONFIG_TABLE
candidate_local_ranges.basis: The map-object contract joins NPC config rows to placed-object behavior, text pointers, event flags, sectors, and movement/actionscript pointers across the map data banks.

field_hints.basis: notes/map-object-bundles.md records primary text pointers for placed NPC config rows.

runtime_consumer_hints.consumer: map object interaction / actionscript dispatch path
runtime_consumer_hints.basis: Local map-object and localization crosswalk notes join placed-object rows to behavior scripts and text pointers.

candidate_local_ranges.label: MAP_DOOR_DESTINATION_TABLES
candidate_local_ranges.basis: Map-sector and scene-composition contracts treat map doors as part of the D6-DF map runtime table family.

field_hints.basis: CoilSnake map_doors.yml exposes door destination vocabulary; exact local table offset waits for the rebuild diff.

runtime_consumer_hints.basis: Door destinations are tracked with sector and scene-composition contracts, but the exact runtime consumer remains open until the diff lands.

candidate_local_ranges.label: TEXT_WINDOW_PROPERTIES
candidate_local_ranges.basis: UI/font contract records E0 text-window graphics, property rows, and palette/font-colour data as the local window-facing table family.

field_hints.candidate_local_field: window configuration width or window-property row field
field_hints.basis: CoilSnake window_configuration_table.yml exposes editor width vocabulary; local E0 window-property row linkage needs a changed span.

runtime_consumer_hints.consumer: C0/C4 text-window setup and rendering helpers
runtime_consumer_hints.basis: Existing UI contracts identify C0/C4 callers for window graphics, palette flavor, and rendering primitives.
